unions.name: Model
Msg
unions.comment:
Local messages of Json.Viewer component. Usage example:

    type Msg
        = JsonViewerMsg Json.Viewer.Msg
        | {- ...the rest of your app messages -}

values.name: init
update
values.comment:
Toggle expandable node. Usage example:

    update msg model =
        case msg of
            JsonViewerMsg m ->
                { model
                    | jsonViewer =
                        model.jsonViewer |> update m
                } ! []

            {- ...the rest of your app message handling -}

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render JsonViewer

    jsonValue
        |> view
            { expandedNodes = expandedNodes
            , onToggle = ToggleNode
            } []
